section_name: Annual Update to Unified Transportation Program
text:
(a) The department shall annually update the unified transportation program.

(b) The annual update must include:

(1) the annual funding forecast required by Section 201.993 (Annual Funding and Cash Flow Forecasts) ;

(2) the list of major transportation projects required by Section 201.994 (Major Transportation Projects) (b);

(3) the category to which the project has been assigned and the priority of the project in the category under Section 201.995 (Priority Projects in Program Categories) ; and

(4) the analysis required by Section 201.808 (Transportation Expenditure Priorities) (i).

(c) The department shall collaborate with local transportation entities to develop the annual update to the unified transportation program.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.992 — Annual Update to Unified Transportation Program

(a) The department shall annually update the unified transportation program.

(b) The annual update must include:

    (1) the annual funding forecast required by Section 201.993 (Annual Funding and Cash Flow Forecasts) ;

    (2) the list of major transportation projects required by Section 201.994 (Major Transportation Projects) (b);

    (3) the category to which the project has been assigned and the priority of the project in the category under Section 201.995 (Priority Projects in Program Categories) ; and

    (4) the analysis required by Section 201.808 (Transportation Expenditure Priorities) (i).

(c) The department shall collaborate with local transportation entities to develop the annual update to the unified transportation program.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 533 (S.B.312), Sec. 15, eff. September 1, 2017.*
